title: Oracle Signal
description: A risk or data signal from an oracle network or data feed provider. Sentinel consumes verified oracle outputs — it does not attest to external data.

provider.description: Name of the oracle or data feed provider.

asset_id.description: Asset this signal relates to, if applicable.

entity_id.description: Entity this signal relates to, if applicable.

value.description: The signal value. Type depends on signal_type.

expires_at.description: When the signal should be considered stale.

hash.description: SHA256 of the canonical signal content.

proof_reference.description: Optional reference to a ZK proof or on-chain attestation.
